overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket walking through a foggy, desolate urban waterfront area. The character moves from a narrow alley with a red fence past a parked car, then along a cracked concrete path beside a body of water, with heavy fog obscuring the distant view.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with graffiti-covered red fence

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow alley, passing a parked green car on the left

entered.detail: tall weathered concrete wall with graffiti stains
abandoned green sedan parked along the fence
long red corrugated metal fence with white graffiti markings
old stone retaining wall partially covered with ivy
wooden telephone pole with multiple crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, foggy alleyway flanked by a concrete wall on the left and a stone wall on the right. A green abandoned car sits beside a long red metal fence covered in graffiti, while utility poles fade into the dense fog ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with metal guardrail

events.description: exits narrow alley onto open waterfront path with metal guardrail overlooking water

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved waterfront path, turning slightly right then proceeding straight

entered.detail: rusted metal guardrail running along the water's edge
diamond-shaped yellow warning sign on a metal pole

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley, the scene opens onto a wide waterfront promenade with a metal guardrail on the right overlooking foggy water. The stone wall continues now on the left, while utility poles line the path ahead. A yellow road sign stands in the center of the path before being passed.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy waterfront path approaching park bench

events.description: wooden park bench becomes visible on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront path toward the wooden bench and denser fog ahead

entered.detail: weathered wooden park bench facing the water
leafless tree silhouetted in the dense fog

segments.scene_description: The path continues through increasingly dense fog with the metal guardrail still running along the water. A weathered wooden bench appears on the left, and bare trees loom in the mist ahead. The stone retaining wall remains on the left as the character approaches the bench.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic urban alleyway into an expansive, fog-shrouded waterfront promenade. It begins by tracking the character through a narrow passage flanked by concrete and stone walls, passing an abandoned green car and a graffiti-covered red metal fence. As the character emerges from the alley, the space opens up into a wide path where a metal guardrail appears on the right overlooking the water and a yellow road sign stands in the center of the way. The scene then shifts into increasingly dense mist as the camera continues along the promenade, passing a weathered wooden bench on the left. Finally, the path leads toward the silhouettes of bare trees looming in the heavy fog.
